title: Vera Bradley Q2 Sales Decline, Full-Year Outlook Narrows
text: Vera Bradley reported Q2 fiscal 2024 consolidated net revenue of $128.2 million, down 1.7% year-over-year. Net income improved to $9.3 million compared to a $36.9 million loss in the prior year. Operating income was $12.9 million versus a $42.8 million loss in the prior year. Inventory declined 22.4% year-over-year. Vera Bradley brand revenue was $103 million, down 1.2%, impacted by closure of 19 full-line stores and 2 factory outlets. Pura Vida brand revenue was $25.1 million, down 3.6%, driven by wholesale decline. The company narrowed its fiscal 2024 outlook, now expecting net revenues between $490 million and $500 million instead of a previously expected top range of $510 million, representing a $10 million reduction to the upper end of full-year revenue guidance. The company noted meaningful year-over-year improvement in second quarter earnings, driven by significant gross margin expansion and successful expense reduction efforts.
